fab.label: Edit layout
fab.tooltip: Open this screen in the layout editor

denied.title: Layout editing permission required
denied.message: Administrator permission is required to use this feature.

canvas.placeholder: Canvas area — will be filled in Phase 2

reset_guard.title: Reset this screen
reset_guard.message: Discard changes on this screen and revert to the last saved state.

preview.empty: Select a route on the left to start editing
preview.empty_layout: This layout has no components to display
preview.assets_error: Failed to load editor template assets: {error}
preview.extension_no_injection_title: Nothing to edit on this screen
preview.extension_no_injection_desc: This extension does not add any visually editable elements to this screen. Please use code editing instead.
preview.extension_gated_title: No editable elements in this state
preview.extension_gated_desc: The area this extension injects into only appears in a specific screen state. That state is not defined in the editor settings, so it cannot be edited visually. Please use code editing instead.
preview.extension_gated_desc_with_states: The area this extension injects into only appears in a specific screen state. Switch to that state using the state selector at the top to edit it.

version_history.title: Version history
version_history.restore_confirm: Restore this version? Your current unsaved changes will be lost.
version_history.restore_not_found: That version could not be found. Please refresh the list.
version_history.diff_too_large: The changes are too large to display.

preview_action.no_document: No layout is selected to preview.

unauthorized.title: Sign-in required
unauthorized.message: Your session has expired or you are signed out. Redirecting to the sign-in page...

forbidden.title: You don't have access to this layout
forbidden.message: Your account doesn't have permission to edit this screen. Ask an administrator to grant access, or sign in with a different account.

not_found.title: Layout not found
not_found.message: The requested layout doesn't exist or has been removed. Please pick another route.

server_error.title: Something went wrong on the server
server_error.message: The server returned an error while loading this layout. Please try again in a moment.

network.title: Check your network connection
network.message: Unable to reach the server. Verify your connection and try again.

unknown.title: Failed to load layout
unknown.message: An unexpected problem occurred. Please try again or contact an administrator.

palette.title: Add element
palette.empty: No elements available for this location
palette.spec_missing: This template has no editor spec. Element insertion is disabled.
palette.requires_default_node_missing: This component cannot be added until the template defines its default style. Add componentPalette.entries.<name>.defaultNode in editor-spec.json.

context_menu.separate_branch_hint: Use this when this device needs a different set of elements. To change only style (color, spacing, etc.), use the Properties > Style tab instead.
context_menu.merge_branch_hint: Removes the device-specific layout and reverts to the default configuration.

overlay.locked_data_bound: Data-bound regions cannot be edited directly
overlay.jump_device_hint: This region has a separate layout defined for {device}. Click to switch to that device view and edit it.
overlay.inherit_banner: These settings are inherited from the common layout. Change them to override for this screen.
overlay.enabled_hint: Show a placeholder while this screen loads its data.
overlay.fallback_hint: Used when the region above is not found.
overlay.waitfor_hint: Keep the loading screen until the selected data has loaded.
overlay.waitfor_empty: No data sources to wait for.

save.blocked_inactive_extension: Cannot save — newly added components belong to a deactivated extension
save.guard_no_document: No layout document loaded — nothing to save

concurrent.title: Another user saved first
concurrent.message: This layout was saved by another administrator. Load the latest version?

save.conflict: A conflict occurred because it was saved elsewhere first.

action.no_events: This element has no configurable actions
action.no_recipes: This template provides no available actions
action.advanced_preserved: Action authored in the code editor (preserved)

visibility.no_recipes: This template provides no available display conditions
visibility.advanced_preserved: Condition authored in the code editor (preserved)

flex.not_flex: This element is not an alignment box

property_modal.title: Edit properties: {name}
property_modal.no_editable_props: This element has no editable properties

injected_props.title: Properties injected by extensions
injected_props.help: Base properties apply to every screen; injected properties apply only while this extension is active.
injected_props.save_target: On save: recorded on this extension row.

property_modal.tab_deferred: This tab is supported in a later phase
property_modal.advanced_deferred: This advanced property is supported in a later phase
property_modal.advanced_badge: This element contains advanced settings authored in the code editor
property_modal.branch_badge: This element belongs to the {device}-only layout — other devices show a different layout.

scope.custom_priority_note: A custom range takes priority over PC/Tablet/Mobile.

property_modal.dark_code_only: This color can only be edited in code mode for dark mode
property_modal.dark_preset_only: In dark mode, pick a preset color from the panel to apply it (free typed values are light-only)

id.label: Element ID
id.binding_hint: Connect an index or row key from a repeating list as data to give each item a unique ID (e.g. item_{{$idx}})

dataKey.label: Form data binding
dataKey.hint: The name that groups the input fields. Prefix with _global. or _isolated. to bind to a global or isolated scope.
dataKey.bound_degraded: This value is set in the code editor.

isolatedScopeId.label: Scope name
isolatedScopeId.duplicate: Another element already uses this scope name. They will share the same state.

isolatedState.label: Isolated region
isolatedState.off_hint: Give this element its own state, separate from the rest of the page.

list_editor.no_child_component: No child component is configured to add

array_editor.no_array_prop: No array property is configured to edit

table_editor.title: Edit table
table_editor.move_blocked_section: Cannot move across the table header/body boundary
table_editor.select_hint: Click a cell to select, Shift+click to select a range, then merge
table_editor.dark_free_color_hint: Dark mode supports preset colors only (custom colors are light-only)

table_inplace.select_cell_hint: Click a cell on the canvas to show merge/border tools.

attachment_manager.title: Manage images for this layout
attachment_manager.delete_confirm: Delete this image? This cannot be undone.
attachment_manager.empty: No images uploaded for this layout.

translation_manager.title: Manage translation keys for this layout
translation_manager.delete_confirm: Delete {count} selected translation key(s)? This cannot be undone.
translation_manager.conflict: It was modified elsewhere first. Refresh and try again.
translation_manager.empty: No translation keys created for this layout.

data_sources.title: Data Sources
data_sources.description: Add, edit, or remove the data sources this screen loads. Once defined, a source can be selected in a component's data binding.
data_sources.empty: No data sources defined for this screen.

field.label_key_hint: Friendly name shown in the searchable data picker. Type plain text and a translation key is created automatically; use the 🌐 button to edit per-language values.
field.params_hint: Values may use binding expressions such as {{query.page}}.
field.params_empty: Add values to send with the API request — e.g. page, per_page, a search term.
field.fallback_empty: Value shown before data loads or when it fails — e.g. an empty list ([]) under data.

error.id_invalid: ID may contain letters, digits, and underscores only, and cannot start with a digit.
error.params_json: Request parameters are not valid JSON.
error.params_object: Request parameters must be a JSON object.
error.fallback_json: Fallback value is not valid JSON.

data_sources.global_headers_hint: Headers sent automatically with requests. Defined in code.
data_sources.scripts_hint: Scripts loaded by this screen. Defined in code.

inline_edit.new_key_hint: A translation key will be created on save
inline_edit.existing_key_hint: Translation — only the current language value is updated

prop_i18n.create_first: Enter the current language value first to create a translation key, then edit per language.

value_tree.segmented_hint: This value is several parts joined together. Add or remove parts, or drag the handle to reorder.
value_tree.to_plain_lead: Remove the expression and keep only this value:
value_tree.to_plain_warn: All other conditions, branches, and data links will be deleted and cannot be undone.
value_tree.raw_expression_hint: This value is already written as an expression, so it can't be broken down into friendly editing. You can edit the expression directly above, or use [Edit code] at the top for more complex changes.

segment.data_pick_hint: Search and select the data to display.
segment.data_no_candidates: No data is available to connect on this screen.

translation.not_a_key: This element is not a translation key. Double-click the text on the canvas to edit it inline and create a key.
translation.conflict: Another user edited this first. Reload and try again.
translation.token_mismatch: You cannot change or delete the data binding ({{ }}) inside a translation. Edit data bindings in the [Properties] tab.
translation.placeholder_mismatch: You cannot delete or change the data placeholders ({p0}, etc.) in a translation. Translate the sentence freely but keep the placeholders intact.
translation.placeholder_locked: Data chips cannot be deleted like text. Drag to reposition, and disconnect from the [Properties] tab.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.footnote: Shortcuts are disabled while an input or modal has focus.

binding.iteration_hint: This region repeats over an array. One item template is rendered once per data row.

inline_binding.none: No data is bound to this text
inline_binding.append_hint: Insert data at end of text
inline_binding.param_hint: Edit the sentence in the [Translation] tab (drag data chips to reposition); here you can change, add, or disconnect the connected data sources.

host_picker.title: Select representative host layout
host_picker.description: This extension is injected into multiple screens. Choose which screen to edit on. Saved changes apply to every screen this extension is injected into.
host_picker.description_with_label: The "{label}" extension is injected into multiple screens. Choose which screen to edit on.

computed.overridden_hint: This value overrides the common layout.
computed.override_notice: This name overrides a value from the common layout.
computed.key_duplicate: This name is already in use.

init_actions.empty: No actions run when this screen opens.
init_actions.empty_self: No actions added for this screen yet.
init_actions.merge_order: Common layout actions run first, then this screen’s actions.
init_actions.base_readonly_hint: Common layout actions are edited in the common (base) layout’s page settings.
init_actions.advanced_param_hint: These settings are edited in code.

initstate.section_isolated_desc: Starting values for elements that have their own isolated state.
initstate.isolated_dynamic_hint: Isolated scopes created while the screen runs are not listed here.
initstate.isolated_orphan: No element on this screen uses this scope name.
initstate.legacy_state: This screen still uses an older state format.
initstate.name_duplicate: A value with this name already exists.
initstate.name_invalid: Names must start with a letter and use only letters, digits, and _.

error.intro: Choose what happens when this screen runs into an error.
error.degrade: When nothing is set here, errors are shown using the default behavior.
error.message_placeholder: Message to show (use 🔍 to insert error details)

page_settings.title: {name} settings
page_settings.advanced_summary: {count} setting(s) are edited in code and shown here as read-only.

banner.inline_hint: Press Enter to save, Esc to cancel.

meta.title: Page name
meta.editor_label_hint: Only shown in the editor screen tree, not to visitors.
meta.permissions_hint: Visitors need these permissions to view the page.

seo.title: SEO title
seo.enabled: Generate an SEO-friendly page for search engines
seo.disabled_note: SEO generation is off for this screen.
seo.page_type_free_note: No matching page type was found, so this is treated as a custom value.
seo.defaults_precondition: Set the items below to fill in SEO defaults:
seo.data_sources_hint: Select the data that SEO variables and structured data will reference.
seo.data_sources_empty: No data sources on this screen.
seo.og_intro: Empty fields use the default set by the core/extension (source shown). Typing overrides it for this screen.
seo.tw_fallback_note: Empty fields fall back to the Open Graph values above.
seo.sd_filter_locked_note: An extension is providing this structured data, so it cannot be edited here.
seo.sd_replace_pre_warn: Adding your own structured data replaces what is provided automatically.
seo.sd_replace_warn: Your structured data replaces the automatic one.
seo.sd_empty_note: Leave empty to use the automatic structured data.
seo.vars_precondition: Select a page type and SEO extension first to see available variables.
seo.vars_required_empty: This required variable has no value.
seo.vars_name_not_provided: "{name}" is not provided by the selected extension.
seo.vars_value_hint: Variable values can use data from this screen.
seo.bot_preview_disabled: Turn on SEO generation to see the preview.

target_picker.canvas_pick_hint: Click an element on the canvas to link
target_picker.id_placeholder: Enter an element ID or select an area
target_picker.minimized_hint: Click an element on the canvas to link it
target_picker.needs_id: An ID is required to link this element

api_call.label: Send to server and handle result

parallel.label: Run actions at the same time

error_rows.default_warning: Applies to all errors not set above and overrides the template's default behavior.
error_rows.override_inherited: Changing this overrides the parent setting for this page only.
error_rows.override_template: This action is set template-wide. Changing it here overrides the template setting for this page only.

json_block.must_be_object: Must be a JSON object, e.g. { "name": value }
json_block.invalid_keys: Names must start with a letter and use only letters, digits, _: {keys}
